englishDefinitions: The formal process of introducing someone into a new role, organization, or institution.
In the military, the official process of accepting someone into armed service.
In logic, reasoning from specific examples to a general conclusion.
examples: On his induction day, the new soldier received his uniform and equipment.
The company held an induction program for all new employees.
Her induction into the Hall of Fame was a proud moment for her entire family.
